summary.worklog_schema_bump: ADR-015 v2.0 -> v2.1 (additive: device: field, 11th column)

bucket_assignments.rationale: Active SWE-process consumer; full work allowed.
Engine / non-frontend only (heavy visual engine, asset pipeline, deterministic sim). No UI / HUD / UX / asset work right now.
None right now. Re-evaluate when an active consumer appears.
Not on SWE critical path. Read-only.
Capstone project, sponsor not in good standing. May be legally mined (code, concepts, schema, docs, tests) into new pheno-* / phenotype-* / hwLedger-adjacent repos.
App-level repo. Pending reclassification per ADR-023 Rule 3 (move underlying parts to pheno-*-lib / phenotype-*-sdk / phenotype-*-framework / federated service). Default PAUSED until reclassified.

substrate_rules: pheno-*-lib: pure reusable library, single concern, no I/O. Examples: pheno-config, pheno-context, pheno-port-adapter.
phenotype-*-sdk: cross-language SDK, stable public API, polyglot facade. Examples: phenotype-go-sdk, phenotype-python-sdk.
phenotype-*-framework: inversion-of-control framework, opinionated lifecycle. Examples: phenotype-hub, phenotype-bus.
federated-service: stateful, long-running, independently scalable. Examples: phenoMCP, phenoObservability, phenoEvents.
FORBIDDEN: drop shared code into phenoShared/, crates/, libs/, or per-app lib/ directories as a side effect of an app-level feature request.

quality_bar.spec: SPEC.md or equivalent, 1-page max, audience = app-level repo owners.
quality_bar.docs: README.md + 1 concept doc, 5-line quickstart, 'when NOT to use it' section.
quality_bar.test_matrix: unit + integration minimum; e2e + perf + chaos strongly preferred for fleet-critical substrates (config, tracing, MCP-router, observability).
quality_bar.observability: OTLP export via pheno-tracing (ADR-012) at info-level minimum.
quality_bar.ci_gate: pheno-ci-templates runs test matrix, coverage gate, OTLP smoke test.
quality_bar.worklog: v2.1 schema with device: field (macbook | heavy-runner).

notes: ADR-023 supersedes the 'Active focus repos' listing in STATUS.md / AGENTS.md as the sole authority on what agents touch.
New schema bump ADR-015 v2.0 -> v2.1 is additive: the 11th column is `device:` (enum: macbook | heavy-runner). Migration is mechanical; 1-week deprecation period with warning, error after 2026-06-22.
L6 health-audit delta (weekly cadence) gets a new check: 'bucket drift' — any active PR in a PAUSED repo or `device: macbook` on a heavy task is a P1 finding.

AtomsBot* status change: previously 'on the path to decomposition' (20 DAG tasks waiting). Per ADR-023, AtomsBot* is a *resource* (legally minable) not a *target* of new work. The 20 DAG tasks are not closed; they are deferred to 're-evaluate when an active consumer appears' OR used to seed the HwLedger reclassification (Rule 3).
